title: Lovable raises $25M Series A led by Accel
summary: Stockholm-based AI-native vibe-coding startup Lovable raised $25M Series A led by Accel, with participation from Creandum and EF. The company has grown to $30M ARR with a team of 25 engineers and no dedicated finance function.

title: BuildMate raises £8M Seed to bring AI to UK construction estimating
summary: London-based ConTech startup BuildMate raised £8M seed led by LocalGlobe. Founders are ex-Procore engineers (technical). Careers page lists openings for Chief of Staff and Finance Manager.

title: Finsight raises $40M Series B with CFO Sarah Chen leading finance
summary: Berlin-based fintech infrastructure startup Finsight raised $40M Series B led by Index Ventures. The company already has a built-out finance function with CFO Sarah Chen (ex-Stripe).

title: Zenith Robotics raises $30M Series A for warehouse automation
summary: San Francisco-based hardware robotics company Zenith Robotics raised $30M Series A led by Sequoia. Hardware-heavy, US-only operations.

title: CropWise raises €12M Series A for AI-native vertical SaaS in agriculture
summary: Amsterdam-based AI-native vertical SaaS startup CropWise raised €12M Series A led by Atomico. Two technical co-founders (ex-Google). No senior finance leader; team of 18.
